title: NORMIA RITA Foldable Arc Wireless Mouse Silent Click Bluetooth 2.4GHz Dual Modes Portable Curved Mouse for Home, Office, Travel (Silver)
features: Ergonomic Mouse: Fits hands curve, arc design. Takes small space after rotate, lightweight and mini (size: 4.6"*2.3"*0.3") compact design occupies less space of your desk. A perfect fit for your hand and your mobile lifestyle. Please check the image about how to connect with the mouse.

2.4GHz & Bluetooth 4.0 dual mode: This creatively and conveniently designed mouse,can work on TWO DEVICES, connecting one device through Bluetooth and the other via RF 2.4Ghz. If you are annoying that you have to own one Bluetooth mouse and one 2.4G wireless mouse separately for your laptop and tablet, or laptop and laptop, or laptop and desktop, this mouse is your ideal choice. You could intelligently switch the mode between both devices just by a click

High Performance & Quiet Operation: Upgraded optical sensor, smooth and fast response offer you a better on-line time. Left and right buttons silent design make you work or play in a quiet environment, won’t disturb others when you at home or in the office

Energy-saving: Built-in battery, easy to charge by micro usb cable, no more need for extra battery, can be charged by computer, power bank, adapter. Can be used 15 hours continuously after fully charged.

Wide Compatibility: Passed 50,000,000 times keystroke test to guarantee extra durability. Supports Windows 7/8/10/XP, Vista 7/8 and Macbook Mac OS Linux etc. Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices.

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

reviews.title: Bought again
reviews.text: this mouse has everything i need it. i don’t need batteries, i can use by 2 device on a time , it can fold and the shape is very nice. good job 👍

reviews.title: Improvement over MS Arc mouse
reviews.text: Does not disconnect from laptop. Very responsive. On other hand it is rather poorly made, feels like it will fall apart at any minute.

reviews.title: Mouse
reviews.text: I really like the Logitech Wireless Mouse M305. It was simple to hook up and I like the size. I like the fact it has a turn off switch underneath so I can extend the battery life. I use it with my desktop.

reviews.title: My favorite mouse
reviews.text: My favorite mouse. I have several of these, with different themes. They are reliable and just the right size for my adult female hands. Most adult mice are at least a little clumsy and over-sized, while chidren's mice are too small. Also this model comes in awesome designs, although this model has been STUPIDLY discontinued.

title: Wireless Keyboard Mouse Combo, Compact Full Size Silent Wireless Mouse and Keyboard, 2.4G Ultra-Thin Ergonomic Extreme Power Saving Design for Windows, Computer, Laptop, PC, Laptop (Upgrade Black)
features: ▶【Slim and Ergonomic Design】 The slim keyboard has a tilt angle for the great typing position. Sweat-resistant, skin-friendly finish wireless mouse in contoured shape would provide hours of work comfortably. The wireless keyboard mouse combo features auto sleeping mode, plus on/off switches to help conserve battery use, you can go for months without the hassle of changing the batteries.

▶【Fast Operation 2.4G Wireless Plug and Play】 Simply connect both your portable keyboard and mouse with one USB receiver(The nano receiver just snaps in the storage of mouse near battery compartment.) without any software and then enjoy a strong and reliable wireless connection up to 10 meters(33 ft) away with no delays or dropouts.

▶【HIGH PRECISION】 Wireless Mouse DPI 1600 in 3 levels- You can easily change the cursor sensitivity and track more smoothly over a variety of surfaces of this cordless mouse depending on your activities;usually 800 DPI for office, DPI 1200-1600 for 4K resolution monitor or entertainment like gaming at home.

▶【Wide Compatibility Wireless Keyboard Mouse】 The keyboard and mouse combo includes a full-size keyboard and a high sensitivity mouse. Works with your PC, desktop computer, laptop or notebook. Compatible with Windows XP / Vista / 7 / 8 /10 operating systems.
【Warranty】: Trueque offers you a 24-month warranty and 30-day no-hassle money back. If you met any trouble with the keyboard mouse, please feel free to contact us for a satisfied solution.

reviews.title: Nice small keyboard
reviews.text: I love the keyboard, but am use to a particular key location on my old dell keyboard. I wanted something smaller for traveling and this is a nice size. I just could not get use to the placement of the number keys, and arrow keys so was making too many errors so had to return it. Had it not been for that I would have given it 5 stars.

reviews.title: Among the smallest with full size keys/keyboard
reviews.text: This product has a small footprint and so takes up less desktop space.  But I found the mouse equally small to the point that I returned the product -- and I don't even have large hands.  So consider this before you buy.  Otherwise it's a good product.

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: Unipows Wireless Mouse - 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mouse with Nano Receiver, Less Noise Mobile Optical Mice for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Mac (Black and Grey)
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the Wireless Mouse. Compact design, easy to take to anywhere. Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Quiet clicks make you concentrate more on your work, and don’t disturb people around.
Product features:
Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes
Package include:
1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB nano Receiver (stored in back of the mouse)
features: Portable and Noiseless - Stow the USB receiver inside the wireless mouse when not in use. Take it to anywhere like home, office, coffee shop, etc. Responsive buttons provide soft click with less noise.

2.4GHz Stable Wireless Connection - A tiny wireless receiver (stored in back of the mouse) provides stronger anti-interference ability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection up to 15m (49 feet), without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Just plug and play.

Enduring Quality & Power Saving - High DPI Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Rated to 5 million comfortable clicks. Turn into sleep mode in 8 minutes of inactivity for energy saving, easily activated by clicking any button. 1 AA Battery (NOT Included) is needed for this mouse.
Ergonomic Shape & Smooth Hand Feeling - Slim ergonomic design and smooth surface for an incredible user experience. Space grey perfect for office use, and can match any color device.

Wide Compatibility - Work with Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. NOTE: This product is connected by USB receiver, and is NOT compatible with Macbook pro or other laptops which only come with type C port.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

reviews.text: I'm not crazy about the aerodynamic mice, but I bought one because of the Llama.  It is VERY slim, but more comfortable than I imagined it would be to hold.  The Llama image is on the mouse solidly, it won't come off, which is ideal.  The mouse was easy to install, took my computer maximum of 1 minute to install the driver and my computer is 7 years old.  The other great thing is it has a 'battery saving' feature that puts the mouse into sleep mode when not in use.  To use it again simply left-click once and your mouse is awake and functioning again.  I use this mouse all day for work and at night for pleasure, haven't replaced the batteries yet!

Additionally, the Kone XP Air’s Charging Dock blends beautifully into your setup and comes equipped with a USB passthrough on the front for the 2.4GHz wireless adapter. To further the immersive RGB experience, the translucent shell and Krystal 4D Wheel set the stage for the Kone XP AIR’s 5 lighting zones, creating stunning lighting effects. ROCCAT AIMO lighting technology produces vibrant RGB lighting displays right out of the box or syncs with other compatible AIMO products. The Kone XP Air packs a performance punch with ROCCAT’s Optical Titan Switches for lightspeed actuation and Owl-Eye 19K dpi optical sensor for precise movements. The heat-treated glides and a Phantom Flex charging cable to even further amplify your unrestricted gameplay, giving you the fastest, smoothest, and most precise experience possible. ERGONOMIC, MULTI-BUTTON DESIGN - Perfected through years of refinement, the beloved Kone ergonomic shape ensures comfort over long gaming sessions. Ten buttons plus 4D wheel expand into 29 programmable inputs thanks to the Easy-Shift[+] duplicator button. STELLAR WIRELESS + BLUETOOTH - Switch between gaming grade 2.4GHz STELLAR WIRELESS and Bluetooth for versatile use. Game all night with up to 100 hours of battery on a full charge. RAPID CHARGE DOCK - The stylish Rapid Charge Dock provides five hours of play time with just 10 minutes of charging. With 4 RGB lighting zones, the dock beautifully accents any desktop setup. Additionally, the 2.4GHz dongle can be plugged into the USB passthrough on the front. AIMO ILLUMINATION - The translucent shell and wheel set the stage for the Kone XP AIR’s five RGB zones, creating a stunning lighting experience. ROCCAT’s AIMO lighting technology produces vibrant RGB lighting displays right out of the box and can sync with other compatible AIMO-enabled products for an immersive lighting display. OWL-EYE OPTICAL SENSOR - Experience smooth, precise tracking thanks to ROCCAT’s Owl-Eye 19K DPI optical sensor. TITAN OPTICAL SWITCHES - ROCCAT’s Titan Optical Switches provide unprecedented speed, and incredible durability with a 100 million click life cycle offering a competitive edge game after game. PHANTOMFLEX CHARGING CABLE - Flexible and light, ROCCAT’s PhantomFlex USB-C charging cable virtually disappears during use to the point that you won't even know it's there. PTFE GLIDES - The Kone XP Air’s heat-treat

reviews.title: Super fun RGB lighting and great for Hell Let Loose
reviews.text: I wanted something with more buttons for Hell Let Loose than the Basilik V3. This mouse is ideal for those that need extra buttons for gaming as that is the primary reason you should consider it. The thumbrest is great as I think all gaming mice should have thumbrests since it’s so much better for your hand ergonomics. I have large hands and the mouse feels very good to hold and gives no fatigue. At first I though my thumb would hit the easy shift button but it didn’t so that’s another plus. I would say the left and right click buttons could be a bit wider and more ergonomic to say something like Basilik v3 which is where that mouse is a bit better but overall negligible. Of course the RGB is where the mouse really looks great, I love seeing so many fun colors move around and it looks really pretty to look at. So if you have a game you really like to play and are annoyed using your keyboard for some critical commands like in Hell Let Loose (map, team chat, squad chat, leadership chat) this is a very pretty, well designed convenient button placement mouse, I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Very nice gaming mouse
reviews.text:
This mouse is very ergonomic, has many buttons, and the software is good. I play many different games and need button profiles for them. The software is easy to use, and it is easy to associate a game/program with a profile for auto-switching when it is run.

I seem to use the buttons/profiles of gaming mice much more than some people. When I read mouse reviews, they mostly talk about the weight of it and other silly things that only first person shooter people care about. I care much more about the number/placement of extra buttons and the software used to configure the mouse.

I have several nice mice from other brands, brought down by HORRIBLE software. Logitech and Corsair make nice mice, but their software is a deal breaker. Roccat's mouse software is WONDERFUL.

I also like that the mouse has optical switches, which will last longer.

Only downsides: Not AS MANY buttons as my Roccat LEADR (started registering the dreaded double-click fault) and the software only supports 5 profiles at once. If you play more than 5 games that need a profile, you have to do the export/import dance. But this is a trivial fault.

The LEDs are a little loud, but I'm not a big LED/RGB lighting person anyway, so you can't fault the mouse. And you can turn them off (though I tend to set the colors to identify the game, so I can make sure I'm in the correct profile.)

Wonderful gaming mice that can be used for many different genres: MMO, FPS, etc.

reviews.title: upgrade from the KONE AIMO
reviews.text: I had to upgrade my previous mouse the KONE AIMO. It has a known issue with the left click which was repaired for a period of time then started acting up. I didn't lose hope in the brand however, because I absolutely love everything else about the AIMO! I play World of Warcraft and use sooo many key binds, so having a mouse like this is very helpful to my gameplay. The Kone XP is awesome. Lighter than the AIMO, similar button style but just feels smoother. Highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Dazzling and customizable...
reviews.text: that's what makes this such a fun mouse for me to use. It matches the keyboard in my home office and while I don't do PC gaming as much as I do on my laptop, this makes for a fun user experience no matter its purpose and it is highly attractive, affordable and easy to use.

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.
